scripts.dev: docker compose down && NODE_OPTIONS=--enable-source-maps tsx watch src/server.ts
scripts.db:sync: npx migrate-mongo down && npx migrate-mongo up
scripts.db:sync:docker: docker compose exec backend npx migrate-mongo down && docker compose exec backend npx migrate-mongo up
scripts.docker:dev: docker compose down && docker compose up --watch --build
scripts.check:gitconfig: git config user.name && git config user.email
scripts.seed:docker: docker compose exec backend npx tsx seeders/index.js
scripts.docker:npm:i: docker compose exec backend npm install
